rationale: The citing paper note explicitly highlights a “scalable approach using machine learning, NLP, and text mining” on unstructured multimedia video data, and the cited paper is a conceptual JMR piece focused on multimedia modalities (text/image/audio/video) and methodological implications for analysis. This strong topical/method overlap makes the citation plausibly foundational or methodological rather than clearly incidental, despite only having a DOI-level match and no in-text quote.
